Name: Create Tenant
Description: Create an Octopus [tenant](https://octopus.com/docs/deployment-patterns/multi-tenant-deployments) with optional tenant tags and project connections.

Parameters.Name: CloneTenantStep_OctopusUrl
Parameters.Label: Octopus URL
Parameters.HelpText: The URL of the Octopus Server to create the tenant on.

Parameters.Name: CreateTenantStep_ApiKey
Parameters.Label: Octopus API Key
Parameters.HelpText: The Octopus API Key to use for the API requests

Parameters.Name: CreateTenantStep_TenantName
Parameters.Label: Tenant Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the tenant to create. *Note this must be unique*

Parameters.Name: CreateTenantStep_TenantTags
Parameters.Label: Tenant Tags JSON
Parameters.HelpText:
The tenant tags in a JSON array format. Example below.

*["TagSet1/Tag1", "TagSet2/Tag1", "TagSet2/Tag2"]*

Parameters.Name: CreateTenantStep_ProjectEnvironments
Parameters.Label: Project and Environments JSON
Parameters.HelpText:
The projects and environments to connect the tenant to in JSON format. Example below.

*{ "Projects-1": ["Environments-1", "Environments-2"], "Projects-2": ["Environments-1", "Environments-2", "Environments-3"] }*

Parameters.Name: CloneTenantStep_SpaceId
Parameters.Label: Space Id
Parameters.HelpText: The Id of the Space used to clone the tenant. **Leave blank if you are using an Octopus version earlier than 2019.1 or if you wish to use the Octopus.Space.Id variable value.**
